nl_query: Count active script assignments per evaluator.
failed_sql:
SELECT ea.evaluator_user_id, COUNT(DISTINCT sa.id) AS active_assignment_count
FROM   evaluation_attempt ea
JOIN   script_assignment sa ON sa.evaluator_id = ea.evaluator_user_id
WHERE  ea.is_active = TRUE
GROUP  BY ea.evaluator_user_id
ORDER  BY active_assignment_count DESC
LIMIT  100;
